flags.message: Snapshot is nearly empty: no docket entries, no filing/termination dates, no lower-court or party detail. The only predictive signals are the case caption and the pre-1971 miscellaneous docket number ('979, Misc'). The prediction is therefore essentially a calibrated base-rate call; if richer snapshots are available for these historical bulk-import dockets (even just a filing Term), they would materially improve prediction quality.
